intro: Marta asks Preben to tell her about Albir. He describes one of his best days there - all in the past tense.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: El verano pasado subí la montaña.
messages.en: Last summer I climbed the mountain.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Sí! Fue duro, pero fue increíble.
messages.en: Yes! It was tough, but it was amazing.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.en: From the top I took a lot of photos.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Qué valiente! Y qué más hiciste?
messages.en: How brave! And what else did you do?

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Otro día caminé al faro. Fue tranquilo y bonito.
messages.en: Another day I walked to the lighthouse. It was calm and beautiful.

messages.speaker: marta
messages.es: Me encanta el faro de Albir.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Después fui a la playa y tomé algo en la plaza.
messages.en: Afterwards I went to the beach and had a drink in the square.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.en: It was sunny and hot. Perfect.

messages.speaker: preben
messages.es: Sí, fui a La Marina y compré ropa nueva.
messages.en: Yes, I went to La Marina and bought new clothes.

questions.prompt: What did Preben do last summer?
Climbing the mountain was easy for Preben.

questions.quote: Otro día caminé al faro. Fue tranquilo y bonito.

items: He climbed the mountain and took photos
He went to the beach and had a drink
He bought new clothes at La Marina
